_comment: Copy to ~/.claude/mcp.json for Claude Code CLI local MCP servers.
These servers connect directly over LAN -- no Cloudflare tunnel or OAuth required.
Replace <SAMVERK_HOST> with your Samverk/Synapset server IP (e.g., 192.168.1.162).
Replace <BEARER_TOKEN> with the shared MCP Bearer token from your credential vault.
Corresponding remote Claude.ai connectors are denied in settings.template.json
to prevent OAuth redirect conflicts in autonomous sessions.
